SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2008 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED FROM APPEAL. JUDGE PRO TEM DONALD F. DRUMMOND. CLERK: FANNY RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT T.C. MCMECHEN, INC. DBA ABBEY CARPET OF SAN FRAN- CISCO RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ZALDASTANI DESIGN $2,637.40 PRINCIPAL, $109.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,746.90, THIS IS A CASE OF MISTAKE AS TO THE USE OF THE SIZE OF THE DIAMOND PATTERN. PURSUANT TO CCP 116.220 (B) IF THE JUDGMENT IS PAID AND THE CUSTOMER OF ZALDASTANI DESIGN, THE OWNER OF 3305 BAKER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO DEMANDS THAT ABBEY CARPETS SUPPLY THE RUG A 12" DIAMOND PATTERN, ABBEY CARPETS SHALL DO SO.
